purpose: Regression guard for trust_bq premature ObjectiveStagnation on high-baseline random-intercept binomial GLMMs. Pre-fix the joint Laplace optimizer stalled at the fast-PIRLS profiled start (intercept biased toward 0 by ~0.03, dlogLik ~5e-3) yet reported ConvergedInterior.
regenerate: set.seed(101); nsub<-16; nitem<-6; reps<-3; g<-expand.grid(sub=factor(1:nsub), item=factor(1:nitem)); g<-g[rep(1:nrow(g),reps),]; x<-rnorm(nrow(g)); u_s<-rnorm(nsub,0,0.45)[as.integer(g$sub)]; u_i<-rnorm(nitem,0,0.68)[as.integer(g$item)]; g$y<-rbinom(nrow(g),1,plogis(1.4 + 0.10*x + u_s + u_i)); g$x<-x; fit<-lme4::glmer(y ~ x + (1|sub) + (1|item), data=g, family=binomial()); reference: logLik, fixef, getME(fit,'theta')
